---
title: Standard Operating Procedures
---

This page is under construction.

<details>

<summary> 100: MRI Emergency </summary>

| SOP | Topic | Link |
|-----|-------|--------|
| 101 | Hardware | [Document](../resources/sops/100_emergency/1_hardware/sop_101_hardware.pdf){target="_blank"} |
| 102 | Medical | [Document](../resources/sops/100_emergency/2_medical/sop_102_medical.pdf){target="_blank"} |
| 103 | Adverse Events | [Document](../resources/sops/100_emergency/3_adverse_events/sop_103_adverse_events.pdf){target="_blank"} |

</details>


<details>

<summary> 200: ND-HNC Operation </summary>

| SOP | Topic | Link |
|-----|-------|--------|
| 201 | Safety Screen | Document |
| 202 | Zone Access | [Document](../resources/sops/200_operation/2_zone_access/sop_202_zone_access.pdf){target="_blank"} |
| 203 | Control Computers | Document |
| 204 | Schedule and Billing | Document |
| 205 | Mock Operations | Document |
| 206 | Incidental Findings | Document |

</details>


<details>

<summary> 300: Building Management </summary>

| SOP | Topic | Link |
|-----|-------|--------|
| 301 | Building Access | [Document](../resources/sops/300_building/1_access/sop_301_access.pdf){target="_blank"} |
| 302 | Fire and Gas | [Document](../resources/sops/300_building/2_fire_gas/sop_302_fire_gas.pdf){target="_blank"} |
| 303 | Tornado | [Document](../resources/sops/300_building/3_tornado/sop_303_tornado.pdf){target="_blank"} |
| 304 | Active Violence | [Document](../resources/sops/300_building/4_violence/sop_304_violence.pdf){target="_blank"} |

</details>
